Bash(/c/Users/ACER/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe -c "
from ingest import extract_text_by_page, chunk_by_sections
pages = extract_text_by_page\(r''C:\\Users\\ACER\\Downloads\\DRHP_20250430105517.pdf''\)
print\(f''Total pages extracted: {len\(pages\)}''\)
print\(\)
print\(''--- PAGE 1 ---''\)
print\(pages[0][''text''][:500]\)
print\(\)
print\(''--- PAGE 2 ---''\)
print\(pages[1][''text''][:500]\)
print\(\)
chunks = chunk_by_sections\(pages\)
print\(f''Total sections/chunks: {len\(chunks\)}''\)
print\(\)
print\(''--- FIRST 3 CHUNKS ---''\)
for c in chunks[:3]:
    print\(f''Section: {c[""section""]} | Page: {c[""page_number""]}''\)
    print\(c[''text''][:200]\)
    print\(\)
")
